easy.questionText: What is the time complexity to access an element in an array?
Which data structure follows the LIFO (Last In First Out) principle?
In a linked list, what does a node typically contain?
options: Data and a pointer to the next node

medium.questionText: What is the primary advantage of a Doubly Linked List over a Singly Linked List?
options: Faster access to the middle element
Ability to traverse in both directions

medium.questionText: In a Circular Queue, when is the queue considered full?

hard.questionText: In an AVL tree, what is the maximum allowed difference in heights between the left and right subtrees of any node?
Which data structure is most efficient for implementing a priority queue where both insertion and deletion of the minimum element must be fast?
